rationale: The task is highly specific, requiring precise structural manipulation by moving a subsection while preserving content integrity and respecting contextual constraints such as leaving decoys untouched. This is a common, realistic maintenance task for technical documentation such as an on-call runbook that a human would delegate to an AI coding agent.
risks: The raw reviewer response mislabeled itself as GPT-4; this artifact records the actual local model used.
Agents may misread the fenced YAML heading text or quoted archive note as structural content instead of literal text.
Agents may drop the table, checklist, or sibling `Noise Suppression` subsection while moving the target block.
